title_en: Ordering, Service Phrases, and Invitation Language
petrov_stage: Make service language and invitation dialogue polite and fast.
petrov_mission: Call the waiter, order politely, and ask for the menu or bill.
focus_targets: Ordering toggles between 要 and 来
Menu and bill are separate service words

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 要, 服务员, 来, 杯.
Listen to a line that uses Ordering toggles between 要 and 来 and Drinks take 杯 and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 要, 服务员, 来, 杯.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Ordering toggles between 要 and 来 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Call the waiter, order politely, and ask for the menu or bill.
Roleplay calling the waiter and ordering a cup of coffee with sugar.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 要, 服务员, 来, 杯, 一杯咖啡.
Which phrase means to drink a toast to something or someone?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 要, 服务员, 来.
Produces one correct spoken line using Ordering toggles between 要 and 来.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
